title: Spiritual Fitness
subtitle: Training the inner man for the work of God
description: A deep-dive series on disciplines of the spirit — prayer, fasting, the Word, and rest. Built for the long haul.

title: Unshaken
subtitle: Standing firm in an unstable world
description: Finding your foundation in God when everything around you is shifting. Anchored. Immovable. Unshaken.

title: Faith That Speaks
subtitle: The confessing, acting, believing life
description: Faith is never passive. This series unpacks what it means to live, speak, and move in active, scripture-based faith.

title: Walking in Purpose
subtitle: Discovering and executing God's plan for your life
description: Purpose is not discovered by searching inward — it's revealed as we surrender outward. A series for the seeker.
